title: bupleurum junceum var. affine
intro: Bupleurum junceum var. affine, also known as Chinese thoroughwort, is a variety of the Bupleurum junceum plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Bupleurum junceum var. affine include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Bupleurum junceum var. affine can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
